title: Thai Citrus Chicken Skewers
description: Grilled chicken and vegetables marinated in a mixture of citrus juice, spices, and herbs. A perfect dish for a summer evening.

ingredients.name: Citrusy Marinade
ingredients.notes: combine juice of 1 orange, 1 lemon, and 1 lime

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine citrus marinade, peanut butter, paprika, garlic, and 1 tablespoon of oil. Blend until smooth.
Thread chicken and bell peppers onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with remaining oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers over medium-high heat for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
